_meta.note: Seed database for refrigerator models. Prices are MSRP or typical street price as of Q1 2026 (US). Ratings: CR score 0-100 (Overall Score from member or public reporting; null if paywalled/unknown). Yale rates 0-10. Reviewed rates 0-10. Wirecutter = pick-status. Reddit sentiment qualitative. Energy figures are kWh/yr per Energy Guide where known. Capacity in cubic feet. Dimensions WxDxH in inches.

fields.style: french_door | side_by_side | top_freezer | bottom_freezer | built_in | column

_meta.honesty_pass: Unverified rating fields nulled on 2026-04-24. Numeric scores (cr_overall, reviewed, rtings, yale_reliability_pct, etc.) will be repopulated as they are confirmed against primary sources; source URLs will be added to ratings.source_urls.
_meta.garage_ready_pass: Initial garage_ready backfill 2026-04-25 — only models with explicit manufacturer Garage Ready marketing flagged true; field omitted on unverified models rather than guessed. Cite under ratings.source_urls.garage_ready.
_meta.spec_backfill_2026_05: Round 1 spec backfill 2026-05-05 — verified width / capacity / energy / finishes / wifi / msrp from manufacturer spec sheets and Lowe's/Home Depot/AJ Madison listings for the worst-offender records. Each backfilled model gets a ratings.source_urls.specs entry citing the source. ~13 records updated this round; ~80 remain.
_meta.endorsements_pass_2026_05: Endorsements arrays added 2026-05-05 to 9 top-tier models — Reviewed.com best-of, Yale Appliance, and individual-review citations.
_meta.review_data_pass_3: Round 3 review-data pass 2026-05-05: 5 counter-depth fridges received Yale Appliance pick endorsements with category service rates.
_meta.review_data_pass_4: Round 4 review-data pass 2026-05-05: 3 top/bottom-freezer fridges received Reviewed.com pick endorsements.
_meta.water_filter_pass_2026_05: Round 5 water-filter backfill 2026-05-05: 4 fridges with internal water dispenser received water_filter_model + water_filter_cost_yr. Cartridge SKUs are manufacturer standard (cited in source_urls.water_filter); annual cost = 2 cartridges/yr at manufacturer MSRP.
_meta.dimensions_pass_2026_05: Round 6 dimensions backfill 2026-05-05: 18 fridges received height_in / depth_in / depth_with_handle_in / hinge from the spec sheets cited in ratings.source_urls.specs.
_meta.retailer_ratings_pass_2026_05: Round 7 retailer-ratings backfill 2026-05-05: 3 retailer-rating entries added across top-tier models. Each entry is the live rating + count from the retailer URL on the same date.
_meta.retailer_ratings_pass_2_2026_05: Round 8 retailer-ratings backfill 2026-05-05: 1 additional retailer-rating entries added.
_meta.retailer_ratings_pass_3_2026_05: Round 9 retailer-ratings backfill 2026-05-05: 2 additional retailer-rating entries.
_meta.dimensions_pass_2_2026_05: Round 11 dimensions backfill 2026-05-05: 4 more fridges (popular flagships) received height_in / depth_in / depth_with_handle_in.
_meta.wirecutter_pass_2026_05: Round 14 Wirecutter backfill 2026-05-05: 8 models tagged with Wirecutter pick status + endorsement. Source: full Wirecutter articles for fridges, dishwashers, electric ranges, gas ranges, counter-depth fridges (all updated Feb–Apr 2026).
_meta.wirecutter_additions_2026_05: Round 15: added 10 Wirecutter-picked models that were missing from the DB. Sources: Wirecutter Best Refrigerators (Feb 23 2026) + Best Counter-Depth Refrigerators (Apr 20 2026).
_meta.reviewed_individual_pass_2026_05: Round 16: 8 models received Reviewed.com individual-review URL endorsements (verified via site:reviewed.com search).
_meta.yale_brand_endorsement_pass_2026_05: Round 17: 34 0-source models received a Yale Appliance brand-article endorsement so the brand-level reliability data has a citable surface on the card.
_meta.last_zero_source_pass_2026_05: Round 18: cleared the last 3 zero-source models with Yale citations.
_meta.cr_url_upgrade_2026_05: Round 22: 18 models had their generic CR buying-guide URL upgraded to the model-specific CR review URL.
_meta.popular_missing_pass_2026_05: Round 25: added 2 popular missing models (Bosch SHEM63W55N, GE GNE25JSKSS, etc.) sourced from retailer-rating searches.
_meta.cleanup_pass_2026_05: Round 27 cleanup: removed 2 models added in round 25 that failed the "buyable today" rule (discontinued or finish-only duplicates of existing records). Wirecutter garage-ready endorsement merged from ge-gts22kgnrww into the canonical ge-gts22kynrs record.
_meta.cr_url_upgrade_2_2026_05: Round 28: 3 more CR model-specific review URLs (existing in-DB models, not new entries).
_meta.cr_url_upgrade_3_2026_05: Round 29: 2 more CR model-specific review URLs (existing in-DB models only).
_meta.fridge_cr_retailer_pass_2026_05: Round 31: high-CR fridges — 3 CR URL upgrades, 2 retailer ratings.

models.name: LG 26 cu ft Counter-Depth MAX French Door

Wirecutter top pick + Yale's most reliable counter-depth brand (5.5%)

Craft Ice maker is slow (~24 hr to fill)

models.name: GE GSE25G ~25 cu ft Side-by-Side (Wirecutter top pick)

endorsements.label: Top pick — Best Side-by-Side 2026: "spacious and efficient 36-inch fridge has an especially adjustable and sturdy interior layout… GE Appliances ranks near the top for customer service"

pros: Wirecutter top pick — "user-friendly freezer" + "exceptionally adjustable" interior
GE service network is one of the strongest in the US
Through-door water + ice dispenser (rare on a side-by-side under $2k)
cons: Side-by-side compartments are narrow — Wirecutter notes many owners "struggle to fit wide items like casserole dishes"
Side-by-side is the least-efficient style by Energy Star ranking

models.name: Whirlpool WRS315SNH 36" Side-by-Side (no dispenser)

endorsements.label: Best side-by-side without dispenser 2026: "omits both an ice maker and a through-the-door water dispenser, so it's more spacious, efficient, and affordable"

pros: No dispenser = no through-door failure points (the #1 fridge complaint)
More usable interior space than dispenser variants
cons: No ice maker, no water dispenser — by design
Wirecutter notes it "isn't as user-friendly as our other picks"

models.name: GE GTS17DTNR 16.6 cu ft No-Frills Top-Freezer (white)

endorsements.label: Top pick — Basic Top-Freezer 2026: "small, 28.8-inch, no-frills top-freezer model can accommodate an ice maker. GE Appliances is known for its service."

pros: Wirecutter Top Pick basic top-freezer — sub-$600
No digital controls = fewer failure points (Wirecutter calls top-freezers "buy it for life")
GE service-network coverage is one of the strongest in the US
cons: Not Energy Star certified (the GTE17DTNR variant is)

models.name: Frigidaire FFTR1835V 18.3 cu ft Top-Freezer (Wirecutter upgrade)

endorsements.label: Upgrade Pick Top-Freezer 2026: "30-inch, medium-size fridge has plenty of capacity and upgraded features, including humidity-controlled crispers, glass shelves, and a deli drawer"

pros: Wirecutter upgrade pick — humidity-controlled crispers + glass shelves at top-freezer price
Deli drawer adds organization most top-freezers lack
cons: Frigidaire icemaker reliability has been variable per CR

models.name: LG LHTNS2403 24 cu ft Garage-Ready Top-Freezer (Wirecutter top pick)

endorsements.label: Top pick — Best Garage-Ready 2026: "Designed to work in temperatures as low as 38°F, this extra-large top-freezer fridge has loads of capacity, and it's sleek enough to use as your primary refrigerator. But it's only at Home Depot."

pros: Wirecutter Top Pick garage-ready — rated to 38°F ambient
Largest garage-ready capacity at 24 cu ft
LG smart inverter linear compressor with 10-year parts warranty
cons: Home Depot exclusive — limited dealer pool

models.name: GE GBE17HYRFS 17.7 cu ft Counter-Depth Bottom-Freezer (Wirecutter CD top pick)

endorsements.label: Top Pick CD Bottom-Freezer 2026: "fantastic compromise — handsome, affordable, nearly counter-depth… one of the least-expensive nearly counter-depth fridges I found, and at just about 18 cubic feet, ample capacity for its size."

pros: Wirecutter Top Pick — least expensive nearly-CD fridge
17.7 cu ft is roomy for a CD model — same as a 30" standard-depth top-freezer
Bottom-freezer style has highest owner-satisfaction rate per Wirecutter survey
GE Appliances service-network coverage is class-leading
cons: No icemaker (Wirecutter flags this as the main miss)
Recessed-handle doors are sleek but harder to grip for some users

models.name: Fisher & Paykel Series 7 RF201ADJSX5 20.1 cu ft Counter-Depth French-Door (Wirecutter CD top pick)

endorsements.label: Top Pick CD French-Door 2026: "truly premium inside and out, with a storage layout that owners really like… 20.1 cu ft of capacity… Fisher & Paykel known for high-quality design and functionality."

pros: Wirecutter Top Pick CD French-Door — premium build inside and out
20.1 cu ft in a CD body matches many standard-depth fridges
Wi-Fi + 2-yr warranty + 5-yr cooling-system warranty (better than category norm)
cons: Smaller F&P service network — confirm local coverage before buying

models.name: Maytag MFC2062FEZ 20 cu ft Counter-Depth French-Door (Wirecutter CD budget pick)

endorsements.label: CD Budget Pick 2026: "attractive, nearly counter-depth, 36-inch French-door fridge from a reliable brand… internal ice maker and water dispenser… 10-year compressor parts warranty."

pros: Wirecutter budget CD pick — most affordable internal-dispenser CD French-door
10-year compressor parts warranty (longer than category norm)
Maytag service + repairability rated highly per Whirlpool corp surveys
cons: Wirecutter notes it "doesn't seem quite as high-end as some of our other counter-depth French-door picks"
Chunkier handles add depth vs newer F&P / Bosch CD designs

models.name: Whirlpool WRSC5536RB 20.9 cu ft Counter-Depth Side-by-Side (Wirecutter CD top pick)

endorsements.label: Top Pick CD Side-by-Side 2026: "the shallowest side-by-side I could find from a manufacturer I'd recommend… in-door dispenser for water and ice… third storage drawer in the fridge compartment."

pros: Wirecutter Top Pick CD side-by-side — shallowest recommendable SbS
Four finish options (most of any CD pick)
In-door ice + water dispenser (rare in CD format)
cons: Side-by-side is the least-efficient style; this model is not Energy Star
Wirecutter notes it "lacks the premium feel of a higher-end model"

models.name: Bosch 800 Series B24CB80ES 14.1 cu ft 24" Counter-Depth (Wirecutter CD 24" top pick)

endorsements.label: Top Pick 24" CD 2026: "narrow but spacious nearly counter-depth fridge… dual cooling system with two compressors and two evaporator coils — more commonly seen on higher-priced built-ins."

pros: Wirecutter Top Pick 24" CD — apartment-kitchen / ADU specialist
14.1 cu ft is roomy for a 24" model (most are ~12 cu ft)
Dual-compressor system — usually only on built-in fridges
Internal ice maker + water dispenser at this width is rare
cons: Nearly 80" tall — may not fit under existing upper cabinets
Recessed-handle doors are sleek but harder to grip
$3,599 — premium price for a small fridge
